epic.title: Fix Da Yun branch audit in module1_macro.py
deliverables: Rewrite the Da Yun branch audit in `module1_macro.py:216-249` to support all 8 interaction types with correct priority and polarity.

user_stories.story: As a user, I want the Da Yun branch audit to use the correct canonical priority ordering and polarity to produce accurate biological/astrological outputs.
acceptance_criteria: The branch audit logic must evaluate: 三会 > 三合 > 冲 > 六合 > 半合 > 刑 > 害 > 破.
definition_of_done: Code compiles and passes ruff verification.
Tests run successfully (if any related tests exist).
acceptance_criteria: The Da Yun branch audit in module1_macro.py correctly implements the 8-tier canonical interaction priority: 三会 > 三合 > 冲 > 六合 > 半合 > 刑 > 害 > 破.
The audit scans all 4 natal branches for each interaction type to find matches without short-circuiting on the first natal branch, keeping the highest priority match.
The core polarity logic correctly handles 用神 (medicine) and 忌神 (taboo) to determine the sign of the Da Yun branch impact.
The code runs through ruff check and ruff format with zero errors.

cells.criterion: The Da Yun branch audit must check all 8 interaction types in correct canonical order.
The polarity calculation must flip the sign correctly according to medicine and taboo rules.

draft.summary: We are rewriting the Da Yun branch audit in module1_macro.py to correctly check all 8 interaction types in canonical priority order, while using the computed polarity tables to adjust the final impacts.

subtasks.title: Da Yun Branch Audit Rewrite
subtasks.instruction: Rewrite the Da Yun branch audit in module1_macro.py to use the 8-tier canonical order and apply polarity rules. Ensure _unified_medicine and _unified_taboo are defined beforehand. Scan all 4 natal branches per type.
subtasks.acceptance: Da Yun branch audit rewritten cleanly and formatted by ruff.

evidence.content: Lines 216-249 in module1_macro.py contain the current branch audit logic.

risks: Variable scope mismatch if _unified_medicine and _unified_taboo sets are defined lower in the function. Solved by defining/computing them early.

strategy.how_to_fix: We rewrite the branch audit section of module1_macro.py to use a structured scan of the 8 canonical interaction types in priority order. We define _unified_medicine and _unified_taboo sets early in the function to prevent NameError, and we apply the polarity logic to the matching interaction.

tasks.title: Rewrite Da Yun branch audit
tasks.instruction: Rewrite the Da Yun branch audit section starting at line 216. Implement the 8-tier canonical order of checks: 三会 > 三合 > 冲 > 六合 > 半合 > 刑 > 害 > 破. Initialize _unified_medicine and _unified_taboo sets before the audit. Apply the polarity formula for the matched interaction elements and elements in medicine/taboo sets. Ensure ruff formatting compliance.
tasks.acceptance: The Da Yun branch audit correctly returns priority-sorted, polarity-adjusted impacts, and is ruff compliant.

evidence.content: The first 250 lines of module1_macro.py show the current sequential if-blocks from line 216 to 249.

tasks.notes: Do not modify any annual Tai Sui or void audit sections.
